top_signals.title: US and Iran Remain in Holding Pattern
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg News White House Correspondent Kate Sullivan joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the most recent updates on Iran, including President Trump canceling his weekend plans to stay in DC. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
